repair_candidate.summary: Replace useful but dirty source PR #80147 with a narrow Clownfish PR that bounds remote CDP Playwright tab enumeration with the existing timeout budget and evicts stuck cached/in-flight connections on timeout, preserving @HemantSudarshan credit.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(browser): time out remote tab enumeration
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Bounds remote CDP Playwright tab enumeration with the existing timeout budget.
- Evicts the scoped cached/in-flight Playwright connection when enumeration times out so later requests can reconnect cleanly.
- Preserves regression coverage from source PR #80147.

## Credit
This replacement is based on https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/80147 by @HemantSudarshan. Clownfish is carrying the fix forward with source PR attribution because the original branch is dirty/unmergeable against current main and this job blocks force-push repair.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/browser/src/browser/pw-session.connections.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/server-context.remote-profile-tab-ops.playwright.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Credit @HemantSudarshan as the source PR author.
Replacement PR body should say it is based on source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/80147 and preserves attribution for the original contribution.
